2018.note: 16 papers. No TECS 5s for even years. Low count is structural.

2020.note: 15 papers. No TECS 5s for even years. Low count is structural.

2022.note: 11 papers. No TECS 5s for even years. Low count is structural.

2024.note: No data. TECS 5s for 2024 not yet published (ACM DL 404). DBLP conf/ also empty.

2019.note: 2 new TECS papers + 66 already from SPARQL = 68 total
